findings.message: 10 of 10 IR layout intents have a matching pptx layout.
0 distinct font size levels found in the slide master(s) (heading-1, body, caption tiers, etc.).
findings.remediation: Define explicit font-size tokens for heading, body, and caption tiers in the slide master. Without a hierarchy, renderers can't infer emphasis from the IR's beat structure.

findings.message: 0 explicit color(s) defined in master XML. (Note: theme colors aren't counted here — they may inflate the effective palette beyond this number.)
findings.remediation: Define brand colors as explicit tokens in your theme or master. Scattered hex values across slides make consistent rendering hard.

findings.message: 0 typeface(s) explicitly named in master XML. (theme-only typography)
findings.remediation: Pick 1-2 typefaces (display + body) and define them as tokens. >3 typefaces creates visual noise.

findings.message: 1 layout(s) in the template don't map to any IR intent: Vertical Title and Text
